query:
-- 1. Contact trust tier breakdown
SELECT contactTrustTier, COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
GROUP BY contactTrustTier
ORDER BY count DESC;

-- 2. Enrichment source breakdown (top sources)
SELECT enrichmentSource, COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichmentSource IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY enrichmentSource
ORDER BY count DESC;

-- 3. Project lifecycle status breakdown
SELECT lifecycleStatus, COUNT(*) as count
FROM projects
GROUP BY lifecycleStatus
ORDER BY count DESC;

-- 4. Active non-suppressed projects with NO send_ready contacts
SELECT COUNT(*) as projects_with_no_send_ready_contact
FROM projects p
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contacts c
    JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
    WHERE cp.projectId = p.id
    AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  );

-- 5. DigestSafe vs not digestSafe for active projects
SELECT digestSafe, COUNT(*) as count
FROM projects
WHERE suppressed = 0 AND lifecycleStatus = 'active'
GROUP BY digestSafe;

-- 6. Lusha credits used today and all time
SELECT 
  SUM(creditsUsed) as total_credits_all_time,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(createdAt) = CURDATE() THEN creditsUsed ELSE 0 END) as credits_today,
  SUM(CASE WHEN contactPromoted = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total_promoted
FROM lushaEnrichmentLog;
